name: Find and fix an off-by-one bug
prompt: The function `paginate` in src/paginate.ts has a bug. When called with `paginate([1,2,3,4,5], 2, 2)` it should return `[3,4]` (page 2, size 2 — zero-indexed pages starting from 0 would give [1,2],[3,4],[5]). Currently it returns wrong results. Find and fix the bug.
